summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Shivdhara Charitable Trust NGO website. All 34 backend API tests passed (1 skipped - Razorpay not configured). Frontend testing verified: Admin login, file uploads in Logo & Images/UPI/Gallery sections, all settings tabs, page visibility toggles, language switcher (EN/GU), contact form submission, and donation page with Razorpay integration.
passed_tests: Admin Login - Successfully logged in with admin@admin.com / admin@123 (User: Harsh Gujarati, Role: admin)
Security - /api/auth/register returns 404 (registration disabled)
Security - Upload endpoints require authentication (401/403 without token)
Security - Admin settings endpoint requires authentication
Security - Donations list requires authentication
Security - Contacts list requires authentication
File Upload - POST /api/upload works with authentication
File Upload - POST /api/upload/multiple works with authentication
File Upload - Invalid file types correctly rejected (400)
Site Settings - All 11 tabs present: Page Visibility, Footer Text, Contact Info, Bank Details, Trust Details, UPI, Logo & Images, Social Links, Email (SMTP), Razorpay, Impact Stats
Logo & Images Tab - 8 file upload inputs for Main Logo, Logo Dark, Favicon, Hero Image 1, Hero Image 2, About Page Image, CTA Image, Donate Image
UPI Tab - UPI ID field and QR Code upload area with 'Upload QR Code' button
Gallery Section - Shows 4 albums with Add Album button, Edit/Delete per album
Gallery Form - Title (EN/GU), Category dropdown, Active checkbox, Image upload area
Gallery Image Upload - 'Click to upload images' area supporting JPG, PNG, GIF, WebP (multiple allowed)
Page Visibility - All 7 toggle switches: Home Page, About Us, Gallery, Success Stories, Blog, Donate, Contact Us
Page Visibility Toggle - Successfully toggled Blog page off/on with toast notifications
Settings Save - Footer Text, Contact Info, Bank Details, Trust Details, UPI, Social Links, Site Images, Razorpay Config, Impact Stats all save successfully
Language Switcher - English/Gujarati toggle works, content changes correctly
Contact Form - Name, Email, Phone, Subject, Message fields with 'I want to volunteer' checkbox
Contact Form Submission - Shows 'Message Sent!' success with toast notification
Donate Page - Preset amounts (₹501, ₹1,001, ₹2,501, ₹5,001, ₹11,001), custom amount, donor info fields
Donate Page - 80G tax exemption checkbox, 'Proceed to Pay' button with Razorpay integration
Donation API - /api/donations/create-order endpoint works (skipped due to Razorpay not configured)
Public Settings - Returns razorpay_key_id for frontend integration
seed_data_creation: Test data created during API tests was cleaned up automatically.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working: 1) Admin login with admin@admin.com / admin@123, 2) File upload APIs at /api/upload and /api/upload/multiple require authentication, 3) Registration endpoint disabled (404), 4) Page visibility toggles work for all 7 pages, 5) Logo & Images tab has 8 upload areas, 6) UPI tab has QR code upload, 7) Gallery has image upload with multiple file support, 8) Language switcher works (EN/GU), 9) Contact form submission works, 10) Donate page has Razorpay integration (needs valid keys for full testing). Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_iteration_5.py cover all security and API tests.
razorpay_note: Razorpay donation order creation was skipped because Razorpay is not configured with valid API keys. The endpoint works correctly - returns 400 with 'Razorpay not configured' message when keys are missing. To fully test donations, add valid Razorpay test keys in admin settings.
